chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-800 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on CMA 3574/25 2.For orders on office objections. 3.For orders on CMA 3576/25 4.For orders on CMA 3577/25 5.For hearing of main case. 30-05-2025 Mr. Muhammad Yaseen Khaskheli, Advocate along with petitioner. ***** 1. Urgency is granted. 2to5. When confronted with the office objection as to how this petition is maintainable when the petitioner is not nominated in the FIR as an accused and how she has a locus standi to file the same, Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that he will file petition afresh. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
